content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — release_notes.txt says "public beta" and "still testing the new sync feature, so expect rough edges" (release_notes.txt:1-2)
Pierre: Apple rejects App Store builds whose store-facing copy implies the release is an unfinished beta or test version — that belongs in TestFlight, not production. Your release notes explicitly call this a "public beta" and warn of "rough edges," which may trigger review questions under 2.2. Reword to describe the shipped feature as final (e.g. "New: task sync across devices") and move any beta caveats out of the store copy.
